title: Sajjanar, Kannan Inspect Traffic Flow In Shaikpet- Masab Tank Corridor
description: Under the Tolichowki police limits it was proposed to construct a FOB at Brindavan Colony Road 1 and install pelican signals and zebra crossings at Shaikpet Nala. Besides, construction of a CC road from Ice Magic Parlour to Brindavan Colony and installation of a bus shelter at Majestic Function Hall and translocation of three trees near Shah Ghouse Hotel
